description: Definitely it has been one of the best experiences I have ever had due to its ease of use and the amount of things I have accomplished. Totally recommended!
author: Cintya M.
pros: Olitt is an amazing software that it is so easy and fabulous to use. This has helped variety of entrepreneurs and startups that are looking for a user friendly software to use. This is so amazing for us because sometimes softwares that are too complex, are not our best friend.
cons: I have not had any issues with the software fortunately, definitely it has been a very smooth and extraordinary experience from my end.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: I consider OLITT part of my team, ecosystem and network and am proud to do so. I recommend Olitt when clients are looking for a scalable and fast web design and hosting.
author: Matthew K.
pros: I discovered OLITT in my search to find alternative templates for website design. The templates are stunning and original, customer service is prompt and very kind team. I consider OLITT a designer, boutique service that caters to executive clients to provide a one of a kind offering and design.
cons: Olitt is fairly new team and is not currently US based, which may deter some clients. In a global economy you will get a superior product working with OLITT and a price point no enterprise can match.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Editing website is not user friendly. Please improve. Thanks

pros: The platform is great for small business.
cons: Editing site is very difficult and not use friendly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I expect them to grow in fixed speed and they of course they will be sustainable business model if accomplish more development and integrations for more features.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Modern Website Templates and Landing pages
cons: - Lack of 3rd parties email integrations and E-mail autoresponders. - No Google Fonts Integration till this moment but they promised me to add it. (good feature when done) - You cant's add custom fonts till this moment but they promised me to add it. (good feature when done). - Not too much templates and there are not categorized into niches. (I hope they add more templates for local businesses) - Not full agency feature (but you can use it as a freelancer or a designer and then transfer account to client)
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: It's bitter-sweet but mostly bitter. I know Olitt can be improved and that's why I still have my website there. Meanwhile however, I'm using other website builders because time is running out and I need to sell to get my commissions.
author: Anne M.
pros: It's cheap pricing plans. Loading speed is quite okay, I can't complain.
cons: It's a little bit challenging when it comes to connecting a domain I already own. Everytime I try to add an image to my website, every other image is disorganized and I have to organize each time hence, very time consuming. The desktop version of my website is okay but when I select the tablet and phone versions, all my images in form of products are disorganized.

description: I was looking at making a personal website for myself, as well as just trying out the software to see how it feels. The value is good but the execution could be a bit better.
author: Edward A.
pros: I liked the cost of the software, along with the basic features of the product, since if you want to do something very basic you should be able to do it on Olitt.
cons: I wish there were more options for layouts in the software, and I wish moving sections around were made a little easier, since it seemed like a hassle to move certain fields, from my experience.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Anthony A.
pros: Plain and simple, Olitt takes away the complexities of building a website and makes it feel like building a lego house. I kinda hate these guys for making it so just anyone with literally no programming knowledge or experience can whip up a website worth visiting. There are a variety of base themes to select from and build up on.
cons: There is no way (as at the time I used it, at least) to directly edit or add sections to the website programmatically. Although this might be good for a novice, it limits the possibilities for those on the other side of the spectrum. Also, some modules like the image upload and edit segments need some work. I mean, its either they were trying to hide the controls from users (black icons on a black background) or the controls were Easter eggs I discovered.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: charles O.
pros: Everything is great so far, cannot complain
cons: Customer support, hopefully soon that can be fixed
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years
